All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
AccountCollection
This class represents a collection of accounts for the Wordle game.
Achievements
This class represents a collection of achievements for a player in a game.
AchievementsPane
This class represents the achievements pane in the GUI.
GamePane
The GamePane class represents the main game interface for the Wordle game.
InstructionsPane
This class represents the instructions pane in the GUI of the Wordle game.
LeaderPane
This class represents the leader board in the GUI of the Wordle game.
LoginPane
This class represents the login pane for the Wordle game.
SoundEffects
This class is responsible for handling sound effects in the game.
Statistics
This class represents the statistics of a player in a game.
StatsPane
This class represents the statistics pane in the GUI of the Wordle game.
WordleAccount
Represents an account for a player in the Wordle game.
WordleGame
The WordleGame class models the logic of a Wordle game.
WordleGameTest
This class is used for testing the WordleGame class.
WordleGUI
The main GUI class for the Wordle game application.
WordRepository
This class manages a repository of words for the Wordle game.
